subcodes.title: , spoken on 1912-03-30
subcodes.first_line: All the created phenomena are subject to the law of change and transmutation. Youth is
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع موجودات در تحت تغیر و تبدیلند هر جوانی پیر و هر نهالی درخت کهن میشود
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @law of transformation and change, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures
